title: Major Tax Overhaul: CBDT Notifies Income-tax Rules, 2026, and Replaces Old Act from April 1!
content:
# Major Tax Overhaul: CBDT Notifies Income-tax Rules, 2026, and Replaces Old Act from April 1!

Ek important update hai. Government ne India ke direct tax regime mein ek significant badlav announce kiya hai, jiske तहत Income-tax Rules, 2026 notify kar diye gaye hain.

*   The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) has issued **Notification No. 22/2026 dated March 20, 2026**.
*   This notification brings into effect the new **Income-tax Rules, 2026**, which will be operational from **April 1, 2026**.
*   These new rules are framed under the **Income-tax Act, 2025**, which also comes into force on April 1, 2026. This new Act effectively replaces the six-decade-old Income-tax Act, 1961.
*   The Income-tax Rules, 2026, provide the comprehensive procedural and operational framework for the implementation of the new Income-tax Act, 2025. The aim is to simplify tax law, reduce litigation, and enhance transparency by introducing redesigned 'Smart Forms' and a streamlined compliance framework.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/sites/default/files/2026-03/Notification_22_2026_Income-tax_Rules_2026.pdf)# Major Tax Overhaul: CBDT Notifies Income-tax Rules, 2026, and Replaces Old Act from April 1!

Ek important update hai. Government ne India ke direct tax regime mein ek significant badlav announce kiya hai, jiske तहत Income-tax Rules, 2026 notify kar diye gaye hain.

*   The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) has issued **Notification No. 22/2026 dated March 20, 2026**. [cite: 1]
*   This notification brings into effect the new **Income-tax Rules, 2026**, which will be operational from **April 1, 2026**. [cite: 1, 7]
*   These new rules are framed under the **Income-tax Act, 2025**, which also comes into force on April 1, 2026. This new Act effectively replaces the six-decade-old Income-tax Act, 1961. [cite: 6, 7]
*   The Income-tax Rules, 2026, provide the comprehensive procedural and operational framework for the implementation of the new Income-tax Act, 2025. [cite: 3] The aim is to simplify tax law, reduce litigation, and enhance transparency by introducing redesigned 'Smart Forms' and a streamlined compliance framework. [cite: 5, 6]
